title: Ryan Gosling Totem
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with Ryan Gosling
body:
It's just a little joke resource pack I made, based on a meme.

This resource pack does nothing but replaces the texture for the Totem of Undying  
with the portrait of Ryan Gosling, a famous actor from movies such as Drive (2011),  
Blade Runner 2049 (2017), The Big Short (2015) and First Man (2018).

**The resource pack is compatible with any Minecraft versions that have a Totem of Undying.**
